data.content: Implemented runtime SQLite concurrency fix: open_connection now skips migration/meta write transactions when schema/defaults are already current, DB write operations now use bounded retry with jitter for SQLITE_BUSY/SQLITE_LOCKED, and auto-sync-for-read now uses non-blocking cache lock acquisition so reads are not queued behind writers. Added tests in src/db/tests.rs for open under writer lock and retry-on-temporary-lock. Verified with make sanity (fmt, clippy, tests, coverage 95.04%).
